since_last: 44% of 84 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.09%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 44% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.07% · Gold -0.30% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 44% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.09%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.09%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.92%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -5.74%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +2.27%, NOW +2.22%, SAP +2.09%, CRM +1.75%, WDAY +1.70%. Laggards: MU -5.74%, ZBRA -5.23%, LRCX -5.14%, AMAT -4.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.73% at $157.64
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.73% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
